last_success: ingest.py fully refactored: Strategy 5 chunking, preflight health checks, --reset flag. fetch_anilist.py expanded to 39 fields. anime.json fetched (1250 records). Qdrant running.
next_step: Day 1c: Run `python scripts/ingest.py --reset` to populate Qdrant. Then Day 2: build RAG retriever + reranker pipeline.
completed: plan_v2 with reranker, RAGAS eval, Cloudflare Tunnel, Vercel
Docker daemon started + NVIDIA Container Toolkit installed
docker-compose.yml production-ready: pinned versions, health checks, resource limits, named volumes, log rotation
vLLM v0.19.1 reranker container running (:8001) with Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B
Key fix: vLLM v0.19.1 uses ENTRYPOINT=['vllm','serve'], --task replaced with --runner pooling
fetch_anilist.py expanded: 39 fields (synonyms, source, country_of_origin, is_adult, rankings, streaming_links, banner_image, trailer_info, mean_score, studios, etc.), interrupt-safe checkpointing
app/config.py: switched to SHOPAIKEY_* provider (OpenAI-compatible, requires User-Agent header)
app/openai_client.py: make_openai_client() factory with browser User-Agent for ShopAIKey
ingest.py — Strategy 5 chunking: clean_html() + process_anime() per chunking-strategy.md spec
ingest.py — preflight(): checks Qdrant + embedding API before starting, fails fast with clear messages
ingest.py — --reset flag: deletes Qdrant collection before ingest for clean slate
run_order: 1. docker compose up -d qdrant   # ensure Qdrant is running
2. cd backend && python scripts/ingest.py --reset   # clean ingest, ~1250 records
4. Day 2: implement RAG retriever + reranker pipeline in backend/app/rag/

docker_notes.test_rerank: curl -s http://localhost:8001/v1/rerank -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"Qwen/Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B","query":"best action anime","documents":["Naruto is a popular action anime","Cooking recipes"]}'

shopaikey_notes.required_header: User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
shopaikey_notes.note: API sometimes returns Cloudflare 522 — retry after a few minutes if preflight fails
